projectDescription: A Progressive Web App recreating the 1990s Unix CDE desktop experience in the browser.
keyFeatures: 76 authentic CDE color palettes and 168 original XPM backdrops
XEmacs editor with real Emacs keybindings and GNU splash screen
Terminal Lab with 22 interactive Unix lessons
Netscape Navigator and Lynx browsers for web browsing
Man page viewer with 28 essential Unix commands
Window management with drag, minimize, maximize controls
Boot sequence with authentic Debian messages
Style Manager for customizing themes and sharing via URL
Context menus and keyboard shortcuts throughout
publicApiSurface: WindowManager - window focus, drag, minimize, maximize, close
VFS (Virtual Filesystem) - file operations, directory navigation, trash
StyleManager - theme application, palette management, backdrop rendering
AudioManager - system sound synthesis via Web Audio API
XPMParser - XPM image format parsing and rendering
Desktop - icon management, workspace switching, context menus
Emacs - text editor with Emacs keybindings and minibuffer
FileManager - file browser with context menu operations
NetscapeNavigator - web browser with modern compatibility
